code:
import io
import string

fn count_digit(_ s: String, _ d: Int) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  let target = 48 + d
  mut i = 0
  mut c = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == target
        c = c + 1
      end
    when None
      c = c
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  c
end

fn hashes(_ n: Int) -> String
  mut i = 0
  mut s = ""
  while i < n
    s = "#{s}#"
    i = i + 1
  end
  s
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut d = 0
while d < 10
  let c = count_digit(line, d)
  let h = hashes(c)
  println("#{d}: #{h}")
  d = d + 1
end
